title: What JWST Sees That Hubble Can't
description: Explain infrared astronomy: JWST sees through dust and looks farther back in time than Hubble's optical view. Cite NASA/ESA/CSA JWST mission science. Avoid claiming it 'proved' contested theories — stick to what infrared imaging enables.
cta: Dive deeper into the mysteries of the universe—follow for more amazing space discoveries!
